1. Purpose and Scope

เอกสารฉบับนี้เป็น Technical Specification Document (TSD) v2.0 ที่รวมข้อมูลทางเทคนิคทั้งหมดของแพลตฟอร์ม Zudobot โดยอ้างอิงจาก source code ล่าสุดและเทียบกับเอกสารฐาน TSD-Zudobot-20260622-v1.0 ครอบคลุม:

  • Overview architecture และ infrastructure flow
  • Data diagram, ER diagram, data dictionary
  • System flow และ business flow แยกตาม process
  • API flow, API registry (189 endpoints), API specification
  • Source code structure และ service catalog
  • Error handling, error/warning message mapping
  • Function, feature, middleware, command mapping
  • Cloud server, database, framework, AI spec, ภาษาและเทคโนโลยี

2. Technology and Environment Specification

2.1 Platform and Cloud Server

ComponentSpecification
------
Cloud platformAWS Amplify
Regionap-southeast-2 (Sydney)
Deployment modelMonorepo multi-app (web, api, dashboard, landing, widget)
RuntimeNode.js 20+ / Next.js 14 SSR + API Route Handlers
CDNAWS CloudFront (via Amplify)
Scheduled jobsAWS EventBridge → Lambda zudobot-cron-dispatcher
Environment configAWS Amplify Console → process.env only (no .env runtime)
Security gatescripts/security-gate.mjs at Amplify preBuild

Amplify Apps (Production)

AppPortDomain (typical)App ID
------------
apps/web3000zudobot.zudogu.comd9czp7mb1m4w2
apps/api4000api.zudobot.zudogu.comseparate Amplify app
apps/dashboard4001dashboard.zudogu.comseparate Amplify app
apps/landingstaticzudogu.comseparate Amplify app
packages/widget—embedded via apps/web/public/build artifact

2.2 Database

ItemSpecification
------
EngineMongoDB Atlas (SRV cluster)
Database namezudobot_saas
ORMMongoose 8.23.1
Collections43 Mongoose models (see §9)
Tenant isolationAll queries filtered by tenantId (string or ObjectId)
ChatSession noteUses tenantId: ObjectId — query with tenantOrOidQ pattern
BackupZudobotGlobalBackup — zero-deletion chat lifecycle

2.3 Framework, Languages, and Libraries

LayerTechnologyVersion
---------
LanguageTypeScript5.x
Frontend frameworkNext.js14.2.35
UI libraryReact18.x
StylingTailwind CSS3.4.1
UI componentsRadix UI, Lucidelatest
BackendNext.js App Router Route Handlers14.2.35
AuthNextAuth v5 beta (JWT, Google OAuth only)5.0.0-beta.31
ValidationZod4.4.3
Widget buildVite IIFE bundle5.2.0
PaymentStripe22.1.0
EmailResend6.12.2
Rate limit / cacheUpstash Redis + Ratelimit1.38.0 / 2.0.8
File parsingpdf-parse, mammoth, cheerio, xlsx, docxvarious
Package managernpm workspacesmonorepo

2.4 AI Specification

ItemSpecification
------
ProviderGoogle Gemini via @google/generative-ai 0.24.1
Embedding modeltext-embedding-004 (configurable via GEMINI_EMBED_MODEL)
Chat modelsPrimary + fallback chain via GEMINI_CHAT_MODEL, GEMINI_CHAT_MODEL_FALLBACK, CJK variants
Extract modelGEMINI_EXTRACT_MODEL (few-shot / order extraction)
Optional featureENABLE_GEMINI_GOOGLE_SEARCH — grounded search
Provider abstractionapps/web/lib/ai/providers/geminiProvider.ts
Self-critiqueOptional reply refinement pass
Self-learningFewShotExample extraction via cron + admin trigger
RAGVector search on KnowledgeChunk.embedding + RagEventLog telemetry
Error normalizationapps/web/lib/ai/geminiErrors.ts — user-safe Thai messages
History rulesStrict user/model alternation; history sanitized before Gemini call

2.5 Plan Catalog (Business Constants)

PlanPrice (THB/mo)Messages
---------
trial0250/day
starter9902,000/mo
pro1,9905,000/mo
master14,99020,000/mo
enterprisecustomunlimited

Addons: quota, memory, retention — defined in apps/web/lib/payment/pmRules.ts.

3. Overview Architecture

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           CLIENT LAYER                                   │
│  Customer Browser (Widget) │ Tenant Dashboard │ Admin │ Partner Portal  │
│  LINE / Meta / TikTok Webhooks │ Chrome Extension │ WordPress Plugin    │
└───────────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┘
                                    │
                                    v
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              AWS AMPLIFY — ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)                       │
│  ┌─────────────┐ ┌─────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ ┌─────────────────┐ │
│  │ apps/web    │ │ apps/api    │ │ apps/dashboard│ │ apps/landing   │ │
│  │ 168 API     │ │ 21 API      │ │ analytics UI  │ │ static HTML    │ │
│  │ routes      │ │ routes      │ │               │ │                │ │
│  └──────┬──────┘ └──────┬──────┘ └───────┬───────┘ └────────────────┘ │
│         │               │                │                               │
│  packages/widget → apps/web/public/widget.js (SRI integrity at build)   │
└─────────┼───────────────┼────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┘
          │               │                │
          v               v                v
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        EXTERNAL SERVICES                                 │
│  MongoDB Atlas (zudobot_saas) │ Google Gemini │ Stripe + Connect        │
│  LINE Messaging API │ Meta Graph │ TikTok │ Resend │ Upstash Redis       │
│  Google OAuth 2.0 │ zuorder (order relay) │ Slip verification providers │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

3.1 Core Responsibilities

LayerResponsibility
------
PresentationLanding, admin UI, tenant dashboard, partner portal, blog
AuthenticationGoogle OAuth, JWT, middleware route guards, 2FA TOTP
Business logicBilling, widget runtime, knowledge RAG, order flow, omnichannel handoff
Data accessMongoose models, MongoDB collections, tenant isolation
IntegrationsGemini AI, Stripe, webhooks, email, rate limiting, order relay

3.2 Monorepo Structure

PathPurpose
------
apps/webPrimary app: UI + 168 API routes + auth + admin + tenant + partner
apps/apiStandalone chatbot API (port 4000, 21 routes under /api/v1/)
apps/dashboardStandalone analytics dashboard (separate Amplify deploy)
apps/landingStatic landing HTML (separate Amplify deploy)
packages/widgetVite-built embeddable widget JS
scripts/Seed, migration, security gate, env helpers (may use .env.aws.local)
amplify/EventBridge cron dispatcher Lambda

4. Infrastructure Overview Flow

4.1 Amplify Build Pipeline

Git push (master)
  → npm ci --include=dev
  → node scripts/security-gate.mjs
  → node scripts/inject-extension-config.mjs
  → npm run build:widget
  → cp widget.js + zudobot-loader.js → apps/web/public/
  → printenv → .env.production (build-time dump from Amplify Console)
  → next build (per app)
  → Deploy to CloudFront/Amplify hosting

4.2 Network Flow — Widget Chat Request

Customer Browser
  → CDN: load widget.js (SRI integrity check)
  → POST /api/widget/init {key} + Origin header
      → MongoDB: TenantProfile lookup by embedKey
      → Validate domain whitelist + widgetEnabled
      → Return bot config (200) or 403
  → POST /api/widget/chat {key, sessionId, message}
      → Rate limit (Upstash, fail-open)
      → Quota gate (checkQuota)
      → RAG: KnowledgeChunk vector search
      → Gemini: generate reply (model fallback chain)
      → Persist ConversationSession + ChatSession + usage
      → Return {reply, products?, handoffMode?, blocked?}

4.3 EventBridge Cron Dispatcher

CronSchedule (UTC)EndpointPurpose
------------
delete-tenantdaily 00:00/api/cron/delete-tenantHard delete after soft-delete grace
partner-billing28th 00:00/api/cron/partner-billingPartner consolidated invoices
global-chat-backupdaily 16:59/api/cron/global-chat-backupBackup global chat sessions
vip-syncdaily 01:00/api/cron/vip-syncSync VipTenant → User.isVip
kb-auto-refreshhourly/api/cron/kb-auto-refreshAuto-refresh knowledge sources
few-shot-extractevery 6h/api/cron/few-shot-extractSelf-learning Q&A extraction
order-relayevery 5min/api/cron/order-relayRetry zuorder order outbox

Auth: INTERNAL_CRON_SECRET header on all cron routes.

5. Data Diagram

5.1 High-Level Data Exchange

Authentication
  Google OAuth → NextAuth JWT → User identity (deferred doc creation)
  → onboarding/complete → User + TenantProfile persisted

Widget Init
  embedKey + origin → TenantProfile validation → widget config JSON

Widget Chat
  message + sessionId → quota + domain check → RAG + Gemini
  → ConversationSession + usage increment → AI reply

Knowledge Ingestion
  upload/URL/custom text → KnowledgeJob → chunk + embed
  → KnowledgeChunk + KnowledgeRefreshSchedule

Billing
  Stripe checkout → webhook → Subscription + Invoice → evaluateBotState

Omnichannel
  LINE/Meta/TikTok webhook → ChannelContextToken + Notification
  → live-chat handoff queue

Partner
  invite/provision → PartnerProfile + PartnerClientData
  → Stripe Connect + partner billing

5.2 Data Exchange Summary Table

ProcessInputStorage / ServiceOutput
------------
AuthenticationGoogle profileUser + JWTSession + onboarding state
Widget initembedKey + originTenantProfileWidget config
Widget chatmessage + sessionIdConversationSession + Gemini + KnowledgeChunkAI reply + products
Knowledge ingestfile / URL / textKnowledgeJob + KnowledgeChunkRAG-ready vectors
Billingcheckout / webhookSubscription + InvoicePlan status + botState
Omnichannelwebhook eventChatSession + NotificationInbox / handoff alert
Partnerinvite / provisionPartnerProfile + SubscriptionPartner-managed access
Order flowchat intentOrderDraft + OrderOutboxzuorder relay
Self-learningchat historyFewShotExampleImproved few-shot prompts

6. System Flow by Process

6.1 Authentication and Onboarding

1. User → /login → Google OAuth
2. NextAuth creates JWT with role, googleSub, pendingRegistration flag
3. User doc NOT created at sign-in (deferred registration B+C path)
4. Middleware routes:
   - pending → /onboarding only
   - tenant without onboardingComplete → /onboarding
   - 2FA pending → /login/2fa
   - soft-delete → /account-pending-delete
5. POST /api/onboarding/complete → creates User + TenantProfile + Subscription(trial)
6. JWT updated → dashboard access granted

6.2 Widget Initialization

1. Customer site loads <script src="widget.js" integrity="...">
2. Widget calls POST /api/widget/init {key}
3. Server validates embedKey exists, widgetEnabled=true
4. Server checks Origin/Referer against allowedDomain + allowedDomains
5. Returns config: botName, welcomeMessage, widgetColor, position, requireConsent

6.3 Widget Messaging (Main Chat)

1. Customer sends message via widget
2. POST /api/widget/chat
3. Validate: rate limit → origin → embed key → domain → quota (checkQuota)
4. Load/create ConversationSession (visitor memory, TTL by retention addon)
5. Detect buying intent / handoff intent
6. RAG: vector search KnowledgeChunk + product context
7. Build Gemini prompt with few-shot examples + customer memory
8. Gemini provider: model fallback chain + self-critique
9. Server-side order draft extraction (never trust LLM pricing alone)
10. Persist session, increment usage, log RagEvent
11. Return reply (+ products, handoff flag, blocked if quota exhausted)

6.4 Knowledge Management

1. Tenant uploads file / provides URL / custom text
2. POST /api/tenant/knowledge/upload | sync | custom
3. Create KnowledgeJob (status: pending)
4. Scrape (cheerio) → chunk (500 chars, 80 overlap) → embed (text-embedding-004)
5. Store KnowledgeChunk with embedding vector
6. POST /api/tenant/knowledge/process for batch embed
7. KnowledgeRefreshSchedule for auto-refresh (cron kb-auto-refresh)
8. POST /api/tenant/knowledge/reembed for forced re-embedding

6.5 Billing and Subscription

1. Tenant selects plan → POST /api/stripe/checkout
2. Stripe checkout session created (Card / PromptPay)
3. Customer pays on Stripe hosted page
4. Stripe webhook → POST /api/stripe/webhook
5. Update Subscription status, create/update Invoice
6. evaluateBotState() recalculates User.botState
7. Notification sent on quota/payment events

6.6 Omnichannel and Webhook

1. External platform sends webhook (LINE / Meta / TikTok)
2. POST /api/webhooks/{platform}/[tenantId]
3. Verify signature / token
4. Resolve tenant + create/update ChatSession
5. Trigger Notification for handoff
6. Tenant responds via /api/tenant/live-chat/[sessionId]/reply

6.7 Cron and Maintenance

1. EventBridge triggers zudobot-cron-dispatcher Lambda
2. Lambda POSTs to /api/cron/* with INTERNAL_CRON_SECRET
3. Job executes (delete, backup, billing, vip-sync, kb-refresh, order-relay)
4. Results logged to CloudWatch

6.8 Account Deletion

1. Tenant: POST /api/tenant/account/delete → sets pendingDeleteAt
2. Grace period: recover via POST /api/tenant/account/recover
3. Cron delete-tenant: cascade delete 18+ collections
4. Admin: POST /api/admin/delete-account (super_admin, dry-run support)
5. Protected: zudogu.official@gmail.com never deleted

7. Business Flow by Process

7.1 New Tenant Onboarding

1. Sign in with Google (no password auth)

2. Complete onboarding wizard (business profile, bot personality)

3. System creates User + TenantProfile + trial Subscription

4. Tenant receives embed key and installation snippet

5. Configure domain whitelist → enable widget

6. Upload knowledge base → bot ready for customer chat

7.2 Customer Support and Sales

1. Customer opens widget on merchant website

2. Bot answers FAQ from knowledge base (RAG)

3. Bot recommends products with server-validated pricing

4. Buying intent → OrderDraft created server-side

5. Checkout handoff → Stripe payment link or zuorder relay

6. Human handoff → live-chat queue with LINE/Meta/TikTok bridge

7.3 Knowledge Expansion

1. Tenant adds URLs, files, or custom text

2. System scrapes, chunks, embeds automatically

3. Refresh schedule keeps content current

4. Admin monitors RAG events via /api/admin/rag-events

7.4 Partner Provisioning

1. Partner joins via invite or public /partner/join

2. KYC via PartnerLegalProfile (AES-256 encrypted fields)

3. Stripe Connect onboarding for payouts

4. Partner provisions clients, buys packages on their behalf

5. Impersonation for support (JWT impersonating: true)

6. Monthly partner billing via cron partner-billing

7.5 VIP and Custom Pricing

1. Admin creates VipTenant override (custom quota, duration, pricing)

2. vip-sync cron syncs to User.isVip

3. ReadyPackage and CostPriceScenario drive retail/partner pricing

4. checkout/validate pre-flight before Stripe session

8. Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD)

8.1 Core Domain

User 1──1 TenantProfile        (tenantId = User._id.toString())
User 1──0..1 Subscription      (userId)
User 1──0..1 PartnerProfile    (userId)
User 1──* Notification
User 1──0..1 KycSubmission

TenantProfile 1──* ConversationSession
TenantProfile 1──* KnowledgeChunk
TenantProfile 1──* KnowledgeJob
TenantProfile 1──* Product
TenantProfile 1──* OrderDraft
TenantProfile 1──* ChannelContextToken
TenantProfile 1──* ChatSession
TenantProfile 1──0..1 VipTenant
TenantProfile 1──0..1 StorePaymentConfig

8.2 Chat and Knowledge

KnowledgeJob 1──* KnowledgeChunk   (tenantId + sourceUrl)
TenantProfile 1──* FewShotExample
TenantProfile 1──* CustomerMemory   (hashed email, consent-gated)
TenantProfile 1──* RagEventLog      (TTL 30 days)
TenantProfile 1──* ConsentRecord    (PDPA audit)

8.3 Billing and Pricing

Subscription *──1 MasterPlanConfig   (plan_code)
Subscription 1──* Invoice
ReadyPackage *──* CostPriceScenario  (scenarioIds)
CostPriceScenario *──1 PricingRateMaster (ratesUsedVersion)
PackageConfig — admin overrides of plan catalog
CustomPackage — user-built addon bundles

8.4 Partner Domain

PartnerProfile 1──0..1 PartnerLegalProfile
PartnerProfile 1──* PartnerClientData
PartnerProfile 1──* PartnerInvoice
PartnerProfile 1──* Subscription (referredByPartnerId)

8.5 Platform Config

PlatformSettings (singleton) — trial/quota/payment thresholds
PlatformBotConfig / PlatformGlobalBotConfig — site widget
SelfLearningConfig (singleton) — extraction schedule
ZudobotConfig — legacy per-tenant config
ZudobotGlobalBackup — permanent chat backup
SecurityState — platform lockout state

9. Data Dictionary

9.1 Model Catalog (43 Models)

ModelCollection PurposeKey Fields
---------
UserIdentity, role, botStateemail, role, roles, tenantId, botState, onboardingComplete, twoFactorEnabled, pendingDeleteAt
TenantProfileTenant + widget configtenantId, embedKey, businessName, widgetEnabled, allowedDomain, dailyMessageCount
SubscriptionStripe subscriptionuserId, plan, status, stripeCustomerId, currentPeriodEnd
ChatSessionLive-chat handoff sessionstenantId (ObjectId), sessionId, messages, botStatus, handoffRequested
ConversationSessionWidget visitor memorytenantId, sessionId, messages, sizeBytes
KnowledgeChunkRAG vectorstenantId, content, embedding, sourceUrl, chunkIndex
KnowledgeJobIngestion jobstenantId, status, totalChunks, processedChunks
KnowledgeRefreshScheduleAuto-refreshtenantId, schedule, lastRun
ProductProduct catalogtenantId, name, price, stripePaymentLink, isActive
OrderDraftIn-progress orderstenantId, status, orderPayload
OrderOutboxzuorder relay queuestatus, relayState, retryCount
OrderRead-only zuorder projectiontenantId, externalOrderId
InvoiceBilling invoicesuserId, amountDue, stripeInvoiceId, vatAmount
PartnerProfilePartner accountuserId, email, stripeConnectAccountId, status
PartnerLegalProfileEncrypted KYCencryptedNationalId, encryptedTaxId, encryptedBankAccount
PartnerClientDataClient onboardingpartnerId, clientEmail, clientTenantId
PartnerInvoiceMonthly partner billingpartnerId, period, totalSales, partnerEarnings
VipTenantVIP overridesemail, tenantId, baseAiQuota, startDate, endDate
NotificationIn-app alertstenantId, type, isRead
KycSubmissionTenant KYCuserId, documentUrl, status
MasterPlanConfigPricing tiers SSOTplan_code, msgQuota, retailPrice, partnerCost
PackageConfigPlan catalog overridesplanId, price, stripePriceId, isActive
ReadyPackagePre-built packagesscenarioIds, finalRetailPrice, isOnSale
CostPriceScenarioCost/margin scenariosplanCode, inputsV2, calculatedV2
PricingRateMasterCost rate assumptionsusdToThb, aiTokenRates, isDefault
CustomPackageUser addon bundlesquotaAddon, memoryAddon, retentionAddon
ChannelContextTokenOmnichannel bridgeplatform, token, sessionId, expiresAt
CustomerMemoryCross-session AI memoryhashedEmail, facts, consentGiven
FewShotExampleSelf-learning Q&AtenantId, question, answer, source
RagEventLogRAG telemetrytenantId, method, scores, createdAt
ConsentRecordPDPA consent audittenantId, documentType, consentedAt
LegalDocumentSynced legal docsdocumentType, version, content
StorePaymentConfigOrder flow settingspaymentMethods, shippingConfig
AnnouncementAdmin broadcaststitle, message, recipientCount
ArticleBlog contentslug, status, channels
ConfigPer-tenant key-valuetenantId, key, value
PlatformSettingsPlatform thresholdstrialDays, graceBufferPct
PlatformBotConfigSite demo botembedKey, allowedDomains
PlatformGlobalBotConfigGlobal platform botglobalEmbedKey
SelfLearningConfigExtraction scheduleenabled, intervalHours
SecurityStateLockout statefailedAuthCount, exportAbuseCount
ZudobotConfigLegacy bot configtenantId, widget settings
ZudobotGlobalBackupChat backuptenantId, sessionData, deletedAt

9.2 Critical Indexes and Patterns

  • User.email — unique
  • TenantProfile.embedKey — unique
  • TenantProfile.tenantId — unique
  • ChatSession — query with both string and ObjectId tenantId (tenantOrOidQ)
  • KnowledgeChunk — compound index on tenantId + sourceUrl

10. API Flow by Process

10.1 Authentication APIs

FlowRouteMethodsPurpose
------------
Google auth/api/auth/[...nextauth]GET, POSTOAuth sign-in/sign-out
Sync registration/api/auth/sync-registrationGETComplete pending registration
Register (legacy)/api/auth/registerPOSTInitial registration
Verify 2FA/api/auth/verify-2faPOSTTOTP verification
Cleanup cookies/api/auth/cleanup-cookiesPOSTClear stale auth cookies
Onboarding/api/onboarding/completePOSTCreate User + TenantProfile

10.2 Widget APIs (apps/web — 8 routes)

FlowRouteMethodsPurpose
------------
Init/api/widget/initOPTIONS, POSTValidate key + return config
Chat/api/widget/chatOPTIONS, POSTMain AI conversation
Checkout/api/widget/checkoutOPTIONS, POSTStripe payment link handoff
Consent/api/widget/consentOPTIONS, POSTPDPA consent record
Customer memory/api/widget/customer-memoryOPTIONS, GET, POSTVisitor memory
Context token/api/widget/ctx/[token]OPTIONS, GETOmnichannel context bridge
Updates/api/widget/updatesOPTIONS, GETLong-poll session updates
Upload/api/widget/uploadOPTIONS, POSTFile upload for chat context

10.3 Tenant APIs (45 routes)

Key groups: bot/config, knowledge (upload/sync/process/reembed/refresh-schedule), products, orders, live-chat (7 sub-routes), 2FA, account delete/recover, GDPR export/delete, notifications, omni-chat, channels (LINE/Meta OAuth), store-config, KYC, line-notify, analytics, invoices, memory.

10.4 Admin APIs (45 routes)

Key groups: tenants, partners, analytics, revenue, cost-price (CRUD + import/export/recalculate), pricing-rate-master, ready-package, vip-tenants, packages, articles, few-shot-extract, self-learning-config, rag-events, global-bot-config, settings, announcements, omni-chat, delete-account, site-bot-diagnostic, kyc review.

10.5 Partner APIs (16 routes)

invite, join, verify, provision, buy-for-client, impersonate, clients, client-data, analytics, earnings, invoices, plans, legal-profile, me.

10.6 Stripe and Checkout (8 routes)

/api/stripe/checkout, portal, webhook, partner-checkout, connect/authorize, connect/callback, /api/checkout/custom-package, /api/checkout/validate.

10.7 Cron APIs (9 routes)

delete-tenant, few-shot-extract, global-chat-backup, kb-auto-refresh, order-relay, partner-billing, purge-zudogu-widgets, seed-global-chat-tenant, vip-sync.

10.8 Webhooks (6 routes)

/api/webhooks/line/[tenantId], /api/webhooks/meta/[tenantId], /api/webhooks/tiktok/[tenantId], /api/line/webhook/[embedKey], /api/webhook/article, /api/integrations/zuorder/legal-document-sync.

10.9 Public APIs (14 routes)

pricing, packages, ready-packages, articles, customize-scenarios, zudobot widget/chat/init, sandbox/chat, landing-demo/chat, health, legal-documents.

10.10 Embed and Integration (9 routes)

embed/chat, embed/config, embed/csp, embed/verify, extension embed-snippet, google-session, oauth/start, wp-install, verify-domain.

10.11 apps/api — Chat Engine (21 routes under /api/v1/)

RouteMethodsPurpose
---------
/api/v1/chat/messageOPTIONS, POSTMain chat (SSE streaming)
/api/v1/chat/sessionOPTIONS, POSTCreate/resume session
/api/v1/bot/configOPTIONS, GETBot config
/api/v1/widget/[tenantId]OPTIONS, GETWidget config
/api/v1/live-chat/updatesOPTIONS, GETLong-poll updates
/api/v1/custom-commandsOPTIONS, GET, POST, PATCH, DELETETrigger-action rules
/api/v1/rules-logOPTIONS, GETSafety violation logs
/api/v1/admin/*variousKB, products, packages, usage, visitors, analytics, line-notify, memory
/api/v1/line/webhook/[embedKey]POSTLINE webhook

Total: 189 API route handlers (168 web + 21 api)

11. API Specification

11.1 Widget Init

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/widget/init
AuthPublic (embedKey in body)
Body{ "key": "<embedKey>" }
Success{ "ok": true, "config": { botName, welcomeMessage, widgetColor, widgetPosition, requireConsent, ... } }
Errorsmissing_key (400), missing_origin (403), invalid_key (403), widget_disabled (403), domain_not_allowed (403)

11.2 Widget Chat

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/widget/chat
Body{ key, sessionId, message, attachments?, consentGiven? }
Max message800 characters
Success{ ok: true, reply, products?, handoffMode?, blocked? }
SecurityRate limit, domain allow-list, quota gate, PII scrubbing, usage increment
AI degraded{ warning: "ai_degraded" } when Gemini fails but safe fallback sent

Example Request

{
  "key": "abc123embedkey",
  "sessionId": "visitor-001",
  "message": "มีสินค้าอะไรที่ราคาถูก",
  "consentGiven": true
}

Example Response

{
  "ok": true,
  "reply": "เรามีสินค้าตัวนี้ที่ราคา 990 บาท",
  "products": [{ "name": "Starter Pack", "price": 990 }]
}

11.3 Knowledge Upload

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/tenant/knowledge/upload
Authtenant session
Bodymultipart/form-data (file) or JSON
Responsejob ID + status

11.4 Stripe Checkout

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/stripe/checkout
Authtenant session
Body{ planId, addons? }
Response{ url: "<stripe checkout url>" }
WebhookPOST /api/stripe/webhook (Stripe signature verification)

11.5 Omnichannel Webhook

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/webhooks/line/[tenantId]
AuthLINE signature HMAC
PurposeInbound message events → handoff integration

11.6 Onboarding Complete

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/onboarding/complete
Authsession (pending registration)
Bodybusiness profile + bot config fields
EffectCreates User doc, TenantProfile, trial Subscription

11.7 Admin Delete Account

ItemValue
------
MethodPOST
Path/api/admin/delete-account
Authsuper_admin
Body{ email, confirm: boolean }
Dry-runconfirm: false returns cascade preview
ProtectedRefuses zudogu.official@gmail.com

12. Source Code Specification

12.1 Directory Map

AreaPathResponsibility
---------
Web appapps/webNext.js UI + 168 API routes
API appapps/apiStandalone chatbot API (21 routes)
Dashboardapps/dashboardStandalone analytics
Widgetpackages/widgetEmbeddable IIFE bundle
Middlewareapps/web/middleware.tsAuth, role, onboarding, 2FA, soft-delete guards
Env guardapps/web/lib/env/amplifyGuardrail.tsAmplify env enforcement
Modelsapps/web/lib/db/models/43 Mongoose schemas
AIapps/web/lib/ai/Gemini provider, few-shot, self-learning
Widget logicapps/web/lib/widget/Quota gate, domain validation, platform access
Knowledgeapps/web/lib/knowledge/Scraper, chunker, embedder, RAG logger
Paymentapps/web/lib/payment/Bot state machine, pmRules
Ordersapps/web/lib/orders/Draft extraction, slip, relay
Channelsapps/web/lib/channels/LINE/Meta/TikTok adapters
Securityapps/web/lib/security/Rate limit, PII scrubbing
Stripeapps/web/lib/stripe/Checkout, portal, Connect helpers
Pricingapps/web/lib/pricing/Cost calculator, VIP pricing
Servicesapps/web/lib/services/Email, LINE notify, integrations
i18napps/web/lib/i18n/Thai/English translations
Scriptsscripts/DB seed, security gate, clone helpers

12.2 Key Services (apps/api)

ServicePurpose
------
svc_zudobot_checkpackageQuota check + message count increment
svc_zudobotrulesPrompt injection + safety rules engine
svc_zudobot_recognizeMemory retrieval + save
svc_lineNotifyLINE Messaging API handoff alert
svc_productEmbeddingRAG product vector search
streamGeminiChatGemini SSE streaming chat

12.3 Knowledge Pipeline Constants

ConstantValuePurpose
---------
TIMEOUT_MS10000HTTP timeout per URL scrape
MAX_CHARS50000Max content per page
CHUNK_SIZE500Characters per chunk
CHUNK_OVERLAP80Overlap between chunks
MIN_CHUNK_LEN80Minimum chunk length
BATCH_SIZE20Chunks per process call

13. Error Handling Strategy

13.1 Global Principles

  • User-facing errors normalized to safe Thai/English messages
  • Internal stack traces never exposed to clients
  • High-risk failures logged server-side (CloudWatch)
  • Missing env vars fail fast via amplifyGuardrail.ts
  • AI errors parsed by geminiErrors.ts with retry guidance
  • Widget quota blocks return 200 with blocked: true (not 403)

13.2 Error Categories

CategoryExample codesHTTPHandling
------------
Validationmissing_fields, invalid_body, message_too_long400Friendly validation message
Authorizationinvalid_key, domain_not_allowed, widget_disabled403Block with reason code
Auth sessionunauthorized, forbidden, 2fa_required401/403Redirect or JSON error
Quota / raterate_limited, quota_exceeded429 / 200 blockedRetry-after or block message
AI failuregemini_quota_exhausted, gemini_service_unavailable503User-safe retry message
Paymentstripe_error, invalid_plan400/500Payment-specific message
DB failureserver_error500Generic safe response
Webhookinvalid signature401Reject + log

13.3 CloudWatch Log Patterns

PatternSeverityPurpose
---------
[GEMINI_CRITICAL_FAIL]ERRORAll embeddings failed
[GEMINI_QUOTA]WARNQuota/rate limit hit
[Gemini Provider]INFOModel used per request
[widget/chat]WARN/ERRORRAG/Gemini non-critical failures
[CRON_START] / [CRON_END]INFOCron lifecycle
[STRIPE_WEBHOOK]INFOStripe event received

14. Error Message Mapping

14.1 Widget API Errors

CodeHTTPUser Message (TH)Condition
------:------
missing_key400กรุณาระบุ embed keyKey empty
missing_fields400กรุณากรอกข้อมูลให้ครบถ้วนRequired body fields missing
invalid_body400ข้อมูลส่งมาไม่ถูกต้องJSON parse fail
message_too_long400ข้อความยาวเกิน 800 ตัวอักษรlength > 800
missing_origin403ไม่พบแหล่งที่มาในการเรียกใช้No Origin/Referer
invalid_key403คีย์ Widget ไม่ถูกต้องembedKey not found
widget_disabled403Widget ถูกปิดใช้งานชั่วคราวwidgetEnabled = false
domain_not_allowed403โดเมนนี้ไม่ได้รับอนุญาตOrigin not in whitelist
rate_limited429กรุณารอสักครู่แล้วลองใหม่Upstash rate limit
product_not_found404ไม่พบสินค้าProduct ID invalid
no_checkout_url404ไม่พบลิงก์ชำระเงินStripe link missing
server_error500เกิดข้อผิดพลาดภายในระบบUnhandled exception

14.2 Gemini AI Errors (geminiErrors.ts)

CodeHTTPRetryableUser Message (TH)
---------:---
gemini_not_configured503Noระบบ AI ยังไม่พร้อมใช้งาน
gemini_quota_exhausted503Yesระบบ AI เต็มชั่วคราว กรุณารอ 1 นาที
gemini_auth_failed503Noการเชื่อมต่อ AI ล้มเหลว
gemini_invalid_history500Yesประวัติการสนทนาไม่ถูกต้อง
gemini_model_not_found503Noโมเดล AI ไม่พร้อมใช้งาน
gemini_precondition_error503Noเงื่อนไข AI ไม่ครบถ้วน
gemini_service_unavailable503Yesระบบ AI ขัดข้องชั่วคราว
gemini_error500Yesเกิดข้อผิดพลาดจาก AI

14.3 Auth Errors (authErrors.ts — NextAuth ?error=)

CodeUser Message (TH)
------
AccessDeniedฐานข้อมูลไม่พร้อมหรือบัญชีถูกปิดใช้งาน
Configurationการตั้งค่า Google Login ไม่สมบูรณ์
OAuthSigninเกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการเข้าสู่ระบบ Google
OAuthCallbackเกิดข้อผิดพลาดใน callback ของ Google
OAuthAccountNotLinkedอีเมลนี้ใช้กับวิธีเข้าสู่ระบบอื่นแล้ว
CallbackRouteErrorเกิดข้อผิดพลาดหลังเข้าสู่ระบบ

14.4 Knowledge Pipeline Errors

CodeHTTPUser Message (TH)Tag
------:------
gemini_quota_exhausted503โควต้า Gemini หมด กรุณารอ 1 นาที[GEMINI_QUOTA]
scrape_failed500ไม่สามารถดึงข้อมูลจาก URL นี้ได้[SCRAPE_FAIL]
invalid_url400URL ไม่ถูกต้อง—
embed_batch_failed500ไม่สามารถประมวลผลความรู้ได้ทั้งหมด[GEMINI_CRITICAL_FAIL]
rate_limited429กรุณารอสักครู่แล้วลองใหม่—

14.5 Auth API Errors

CodeHTTPCondition
------:---
unauthorized401No session
forbidden403Insufficient role
pending_registration403Onboarding not complete
2fa_required401TOTP verification pending
invalid_2fa_code400Wrong TOTP code

14.6 Payment Errors

CodeHTTPCondition
------:---
stripe_error500Stripe API failure
subscription_not_found404No subscription record
invalid_plan400Plan not in catalog
already_subscribed400Duplicate purchase attempt

15. Warning Message Mapping

Warning Type / CodeTriggerMessage (TH)
---------
quota_80Monthly usage ≥ 80%โควต้าใช้เกิน 80% แล้ว
quota_95Monthly usage ≥ 95%โควต้าใกล้เต็ม กรุณาตรวจสอบแผน
ai_degradedGemini failed, fallback reply sent(implicit — reply still returned)
pending_deleteAccount soft-delete scheduledบัญชีกำลังถูกลบและสามารถกู้คืนได้ก่อนกำหนด
pending_registrationNew user, doc not createdกรุณาเสร็จสิ้นการลงทะเบียนก่อนใช้งาน
2fa_pending2FA not verified this sessionกรุณายืนยันรหัส 2FA เพื่อใช้งานต่อ
webhook_retryWebhook processing retryระบบกำลัง retry webhook
rag_lookup_warningRAG search non-critical fail(logged server-side, chat continues)
kyc_pendingKYC not approvedรอยืนยันตัวตน — บอทถูกระงับ (pending_kyc)
grace_5pctQuota in 5% grace bufferใช้งานในช่วงผ่อนผันโควต้า

16. Function / Feature / Middleware / Command Mapping

16.1 Middleware Mapping

MiddlewareFilePurpose
---------
Route guardapps/web/middleware.tsAuth, role, onboarding, 2FA, soft-delete routing
Env guardrailapps/web/lib/env/amplifyGuardrail.tsFail-fast on missing Amplify env vars
Embed CSPmiddleware.ts + /api/embed/cspDynamic frame-ancestors for embed routes
CORSWidget/embed route handlersOrigin validation + CORS headers
Rate limitapps/web/lib/security/rateLimit.tsUpstash Redis (fail-open on widget)
Stripe webhook verify/api/stripe/webhookHMAC signature check
LINE webhook verify/api/webhooks/line/*LINE signature HMAC
Cron auth/api/cron/*INTERNAL_CRON_SECRET header

16.2 Feature → Implementation Mapping

FeaturePrimary Files / Routes
------
Google OAuth loginapp/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
Deferred registrationJWT pendingRegistration + /api/onboarding/complete
Widget embedpackages/widget, /api/widget/init, /api/widget/chat
Quota gatinglib/widget/quotaGate.ts, lib/payment/botStateMachine.ts
Knowledge RAGlib/knowledge/*, /api/tenant/knowledge/*
Self-learninglib/ai/fewShotExtractor.ts, /api/cron/few-shot-extract
Order draftinglib/orders/*, /api/widget/checkout
Order relay (zuorder)lib/orders/outbox, /api/cron/order-relay
Live chat handoff/api/tenant/live-chat/*, lib/channels/*
Omnichannel/api/webhooks/*, lib/channels/adapters/*
Stripe billing/api/stripe/*, lib/stripe/*
Partner Connect/api/stripe/connect/*, /api/partner/*
VIP pricinglib/pricing/vipPricingUtils.ts, /api/admin/vip-tenants/*
Cost/price calculatorlib/pricing/fnc_price_cost_cal_ai.ts, /api/admin/cost-price/*
Account deletion/api/tenant/account/delete, /api/admin/delete-account
GDPR/api/tenant/gdpr/export, /api/tenant/gdpr/delete
PII scrubbinglib/security/unrecordPii.ts
Platform site botlib/platform/*, /api/public/zudobot/*
Chrome extension/api/integration/extension/*
WordPress plugin/api/integration/extension/wp-install
Sandbox demo/api/sandbox/chat, landing demo sections
Admin impersonation/api/partner/impersonate
Slip verificationamplifyGuardrail SLIP_VERIFY_* vars
i18nlib/i18n/translations/en.ts, th.ts

16.3 Bot State Machine

Pure function: evaluateBotState(ctx) in apps/web/lib/payment/botStateMachine.ts

StateCan Respond?Label (TH)
---------
trialYesทดลองใช้
trial_quota_daily_exhaustedNoโควต้าวันนี้หมด
trial_expiredNoหมดอายุทดลอง
activeYesใช้งานอยู่
grace_5pctYesช่วงผ่อนผัน
suspended_quotaNoระงับ (โควต้า)
suspended_paymentNoระงับ (การชำระ)
pending_kycNoรอยืนยันตัวตน
disabledNoปิดการใช้งาน

16.4 Development Commands

CommandPurpose
------
npm run devRun web app (port 3000)
npm run dev:apiRun API app (port 4000)
npm run dev:dashboardRun dashboard (port 4001)
npm run build:widgetBuild widget IIFE bundle
npm run buildBuild web app
npm run build:apiBuild API app
npm run build:dashboardBuild dashboard app
npm run security:gateSecurity gate checks
npm run db:test-mongoValidate MongoDB connection
npm run docker:upStart local Docker stack
cd apps/web && npm run db:insert-mock-global-tenantDev DB seed helper

16.5 Environment Variables (Required)

VariableRequiredPurpose
---------
MONGO_URIMUSTMongoDB connection
AUTH_SECRETMUSTNextAuth JWT secret
AUTH_URLMUSTOAuth callback base URL
GOOGLE_CLIENT_IDMUSTGoogle OAuth
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRETMUSTGoogle OAuth
GEMINI_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY_LIVEONE-OFGemini access
INTERNAL_CRON_SECRETCron routesCron authentication
STRIPE_SECRET_KEYBillingStripe API
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRETBillingWebhook verification
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL/TOKENOptionalRate limiting
ORDER_INGEST_SECRET / ZUORDER_INGEST_URLOptionalOrder relay
SLIP_VERIFY_*OptionalSlip auto-verification
MAIL_PROVIDER / MAIL_API_KEY / MAIL_FROMOptionalOutbound email
WEBHOOK_SECRETOptionalArticle webhook auth
ZUDOBOT_MASTER_SECRETAPI appMaster secret for apps/api

17. Security and Operational Notes

  • All secrets from AWS Amplify Console only — enforced by amplifyGuardrail.ts
  • No dotenv in app code; no fallback strings for missing secrets
  • Google OAuth only — no email/password, no magic links
  • Roles: super_admin, admin (alias), tenant, partner_admin
  • Protected account: zudogu.official@gmail.com — never delete/modify
  • Tenant data isolation: every query includes tenantId filter
  • Partner legal data: AES-256-GCM encryption at rest
  • PII scrubbing before ChatSession persistence
  • Widget SRI integrity hash computed at Amplify build
  • Health endpoint: GET /api/health
  • Monitoring: webhook failures, Gemini quota, MongoDB connectivity, cron results

18. Role and Permission Matrix

RoleAccess ScopeNotes
---------
super_adminFull platform + /api/admin/*Account deletion, all admin ops
adminAdmin access (alias)Redirected same as super_admin
tenant/dashboard/*, /api/tenant/*Standard business owner
partner_admin/partner/*, client provisioningCan impersonate tenant
pendingOnboarding routes onlyrole=pending until registration complete

18.1 Middleware Route Matrix

Route groupAccess condition
------
Public/, /pricing, /login, /partner/join, widget/embed/public APIs
Widget APIsembedKey + domain validation (no session)
WebhooksSignature/token verification
CronINTERNAL_CRON_SECRET
/admin/*super_admin or admin
/partner/*partner_admin (except join/verify)
/dashboard/*tenant (admins redirected to admin)
Pending registrationonboarding + auth routes only
Soft-deleterecover + notice page only
2FA pending/login/2fa only

19. Business Rules and Constraints

  • Widget requires valid embedKey + approved domain
  • Widget usage quota-gated by plan and evaluateBotState()
  • Order pricing computed server-side — never trust LLM output alone
  • Deferred user creation: doc written only at onboarding completion
  • ChatSession.tenantId is ObjectId — always use tenantOrOidQ pattern
  • Handoff detection triggers live-chat queue + LINE/Meta/TikTok notification
  • Account deletion: soft-delete → cron hard-delete after grace period
  • Partner billing: Stripe Connect + monthly consolidated invoice (day 28)
  • VIP overrides synced daily via vip-sync cron
  • Knowledge auto-refresh via kb-auto-refresh cron (hourly)
  • EventBridge is source of truth for crons (not vercel.json on Amplify)

20. Appendix — Deployment and Maintenance Checklist

1. Verify all required Amplify environment variables are set

2. Confirm MongoDB Atlas network access and credentials

3. Validate Stripe webhook endpoint and secret

4. Ensure Gemini API key exists (primary or live slot)

5. Rebuild widget bundle when packages/widget changes

6. Run npm run security:gate before deploy

7. Configure EventBridge cron rules via amplify/functions/cronDispatcher/setup-eventbridge.sh

8. Monitor: cron execution, webhook failures, Gemini quota, AI degraded warnings

9. Verify SRI hash updated after widget rebuild (NEXT_PUBLIC_WIDGET_SCRIPT_INTEGRITY)

10. Test widget init + chat on approved domain after each deploy

21. Document Version History

VersionDateSummaryKey Changes vs Previous
------------
v1.02026-06-22Initial TSD baseline from master (22 Jun 2026)First comprehensive TSD: 120 API routes, 37 collections, mermaid diagrams, full data dictionary
v1.12026-07-05Source-code aligned updateAdded middleware mapping, error handling, API flow by process, amplify guardrail
v1.22026-07-05Expanded specificationRole matrix, business rules, sample payloads, deployment checklist
v2.02026-07-05Full production-aligned TSDSee below

21.1 v2.0 Changes vs v1.0 (2026-06-22)

Areav1.0v2.0 (Current Source)Change Type
------------
API route count (web)120168Enhanced
API route count (api)2121Unchanged
Total API handlers141189Enhanced
MongoDB models37 collections43 modelsEnhanced
New models—CustomerMemory, ConsentRecord, CustomPackage, LegalDocument, RagEventLog, SelfLearningConfig, StorePaymentConfig, ZudobotGlobalBackupNew
Cron jobs4 (vercel.json)9 via EventBridge dispatcherEnhanced
New cron routes—kb-auto-refresh, few-shot-extract, order-relay, vip-syncNew
Widget routes58 (+customer-memory, ctx/[token], upload)New
Tenant routes~4345 (+channels, omni-chat, orders, store-config, knowledge/reembed, refresh-schedule)New
Admin routes2445 (+cost-price full CRUD, vip-tenants, articles, rag-events, site-bot-diagnostic, pricing-rate-master)New
Public routes614 (+articles, ready-packages, customize-scenarios, landing-demo, legal-documents)New
Auth modelImmediate user creationDeferred registration (JWT pendingRegistration)Changed
Bot states8 states9 states (+pending_kyc)New
Order flowBasicOrderDraft + OrderOutbox + zuorder relay + slip verificationNew
Self-learningMentionedFewShotExample + cron few-shot-extract + admin configEnhanced
OmnichannelLINE/Meta/TikTok+ ChannelContextToken, tenant channels API, omni-chatEnhanced
AI providerDirect Gemini callsProvider abstraction + model fallback chain + self-critiqueEnhanced
Env guardrailDocumentedamplifyGuardrail.ts with AMPLIFY_CONFIG getter + slip/mail/order varsEnhanced
Cron infrastructurevercel.jsonEventBridge + Lambda dispatcherChanged
Chrome extensionNot documentedExtension OAuth + wp-install integration routesNew
GDPRBasicexport + delete endpoints documentedEnhanced
Pricing enginecost-price routesFull CRUD + import/export + recalculate + ready-package + vip-tenantsEnhanced

21.2 New Features in v2.0 (by Function)

FeatureImplementationStatus
---------
Customer cross-session memory/api/widget/customer-memory, CustomerMemory modelNew
Omnichannel context tokens/api/widget/ctx/[token], ChannelContextTokenNew
Order outbox relay/api/cron/order-relay, OrderOutbox modelNew
Slip auto-verificationSLIP_VERIFY_* env varsNew
Knowledge auto-refresh/api/cron/kb-auto-refreshNew
Knowledge re-embed/api/tenant/knowledge/reembedNew
Few-shot self-learning/api/cron/few-shot-extract, FewShotExampleNew
VIP tenant sync/api/cron/vip-syncNew
Tenant omni-chat inbox/api/tenant/omni-chatNew
Channel setup (Meta OAuth)/api/tenant/channels, /api/tenant/channels/meta-oauthNew
Store payment config/api/tenant/store-config, StorePaymentConfigNew
Legal document sync/api/integrations/zuorder/legal-document-syncNew
Platform site bot diagnostic/api/admin/site-bot-diagnosticNew
Custom package checkout/api/checkout/custom-packageNew
RAG event telemetry/api/admin/rag-events, RagEventLogNew
Global chat backupZudobotGlobalBackup modelNew
Deferred user registrationJWT pendingRegistration + onboarding/completeChanged

22. Summary

Zudobot v2.0 เป็น AI Chatbot SaaS platform ที่ผนวก Next.js 14, MongoDB Atlas (43 models), Google Gemini (RAG + chat + self-learning), Stripe (billing + Connect), และ omnichannel webhooks (LINE/Meta/TikTok) เข้าด้วยกัน ระบบมี 189 API endpoints, middleware-based access control, pure-function bot state machine (9 states), EventBridge cron infrastructure, และ Amplify env guardrail ที่ป้องกัน secret leakage เอกสารฉบับนี้สะท้อน source code ล่าสุด ณ 2026-07-05 และเป็นฐานอ้างอิงสำหรับการพัฒนา ทดสอบ ปฏิบัติการ และส่งต่อทีมที่เกี่ยวข้อง

*End of Document — TSD-Zudobot-20260705-v2.0*
